texto: Robert Kapilow is a born teacher, an enthusiast who can think on his feet, a 110 percent believer in the project at hand ... It’s a cheering thought that this kind of missionary enterprise did not pass from this earth with Leonard Bernstein. Robert Kapilow is awfully good at what he does. We need him.
explicacao: Citação de The Boston Globe sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Robert Kapilow is a born teacher, an enthusiast who can think on his feet, a 110 percent believer…” articula reflexao, classical-music, music em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como music.
